specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-6500 / Ryzen 3 1200 (or any 4-core from 2016+)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel UHD 620 / UHD 630 / Iris Plus 655 or NVIDIA GTX 950 / GTX 960 or AMD Radeon RX 460 / RX 560
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Yes. Preferably one that makes sound.
  • VR Support: nope
  • Additional Notes: A pixel-art game with a low-poly 3D scene somewhere in there, using less than 200 MB of VRAM. So yeah, it probably runs on your device.
